title: Schema file does not exist — materialize it and check off task 2.1
anchor: design.md:290-413 (the inline FeatureList JSON Schema block) and tasks.md:25 ([ ] 2.1 Implement schema/feature_list.schema.json)
change: Create the file schema/feature_list.schema.json by materializing the design.md:290-413 draft-07 schema verbatim (incorporating the fixes in the sibling edits below), and flip task 2.1 in tasks.md:25 from [ ] to [x]. Every Phase-0 gate (PreToolUse status guard, feature_list_init validation at tasks.md:240, design.md:623 acceptance smoke) depends on this concrete artifact existing; today there is no schema/ directory and git ls-files returns nothing.

title: Add plan_approved.schema.json, validate before indexing, and test the corrupt-file path
anchor: Inventory row `schema/` (design.md:138); check_plan_approval bare index `approval["feature_list_sha"]` (design.md:792); tasks 6.1 (tasks.md:132) and smoke tests (tasks.md:285, 295-296)
change: Author a sibling `schema/plan_approved.schema.json` (required: approved_by, approved_at, feature_list_sha, spec_version; notes optional) and have check_plan_approval validate the parsed approval object against it BEFORE indexing `approval["feature_list_sha"]`, so a present-but-malformed file (missing key / non-JSON) fails closed via an explicit schema check rather than relying on the bare KeyError + try/except. Add a smoke/integration test for the present-but-corrupt case (currently only the ABSENT case is tested at tasks.md:285 and 295) asserting exit 2 when plan-approved.json exists but is malformed or missing feature_list_sha.
